---
name: Criterion review
about: Propose a change to a grading criterion (for clinicians & researchers)
title: "[criterion-review] "
labels: criterion-review
---

Thank you for reviewing a JAHODA criterion. Please see GOVERNANCE.md for how
criteria changes are evaluated.

## Criterion

- **Criterion id / file:** <!-- e.g. verifier/criteria/dependence/auto-001.yaml -->

## Your credential (optional)

- **Credential / role:** <!-- e.g. licensed clinical psychologist, PhD -->
- **ORCID:** <!-- optional; lets us give citable credit -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What should change, and to what? Be specific about wording and thresholds. -->

## Justification

<!-- Cite a source (paper / standard / regulation) OR a documented failure
     (a concrete transcript or case showing the current criterion getting it
     wrong). Evidence is required per GOVERNANCE.md rule 2. -->

## Safety-critical impact

- [ ] This change **loosens** a safety-critical criterion (easier to pass)
- [ ] This change **tightens** a safety-critical criterion (harder to pass)
- [ ] Not safety-critical / unsure

<!-- Loosening a safety-critical criterion requires stronger justification than
     tightening it (GOVERNANCE.md rule 4). -->
